shape_semantics: cmp,vp,vpc,naive = W,W,W,L. Every CMP-aware technique (cmplog/I2S, value_profile/Hamming, and the vpc combination) resolves the gate; only naive blocks. This is the CMP-SOLVABLE-GATE pattern, NOT a joint-necessity shape: vpc does not need both techniques, since either one alone already resolves (cmplog=W and value_profile=W independently). The label-source is therefore 'any CMP technique enriches/closes the gate target; naive does not'.
round2_target: 3 UNLABELED branches: libpng/3996 (rule_not_met), libxml2/6690 (rule_not_met), libxml2/6405 (seed_starved). The 11 confirmed branches (7x literal_value_gate_cmp_solvable, 4x cmp_gradient_closes_to_operand) are FROZEN and re-validate under the unchanged KEEP rules below.

hypotheses.label: A fixed-offset literal value gate (FOURCC/tag/enum/single byte) is solved by any CMP-aware fuzzer (I2S substitution or VP Hamming gradient) while naive's blind havoc cannot place the literal

params.comment: Per W/L gate offset, log2 enrichment of the corpus byte == target (W) value vs decoy (L) value, cmplog-and-value_profile vs naive. CMP-aware fuzzers should enrich the target literal at the gate offset; naive should not.

libpng/3996.comment: ROUND-2: added as a cross-server member (sB arbitrates libpng). The card (prompts_a/libpng_3996.analysis.json) shows this is a FIXED-OFFSET single-byte enum gate identical in kind to the 7 CONFIRMED literal_value_gate members and to its confirmed sibling libpng/3966: IHDR color_type byte at offset 0x19 must equal 0x03 (PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE). Winners carry 03 at 0x19 in 34/34 samples; naive losers carry 06/04/00. This is exactly the value-PRESENCE enrichment operand_enrichment measures (corpus fraction with byte==target at a fixed offset), NOT a continuous gradient and NOT a structural-assembly gate. It belongs under this KEEP hypothesis, not under a new mechanism.
libpng/3996.decoy_value: 06/04/00 at offset 0x19 in naive loser seeds
libpng/3996.width_caveat: single-byte enum (width 1): exact-value PRESENCE enrichment is robust here (set membership), unlike a continuous Hamming-distance gradient which is chance-alignment-prone at width<=2. operand_enrichment scores value-presence, so it is the correct tool for this enum.

params.target_value: GPOS table tag (47 50 4f 53) at table-directory offsets ~0x0c-0x0f
params.decoy_value: diffuse non-tag bytes at the same offsets in naive loser seeds

hypotheses.prediction: signed_target_enrich >= +1.0 (CMP-aware corpora over-represent the target literal bytes at the gate offset relative to naive) AND decoy_enrich <= 0 (CMP-aware does not over-represent the off-gate decoy bytes). DISCRIMINATING: a pure structural/length mechanism (not a literal-value gate) would predict signed_target_enrich ~ 0 at any fixed offset because no single byte value is privileged; an enrichment confirms the gate is a fixed-offset literal that CMP introspection targets, ruling out a structural-assembly alternative. G2: enrichment is measured over corpus byte content, independent of the resolve pattern that defined the shape.

hypotheses.label: The CMP-aware corpus (value_profile Hamming gradient / I2S substitution) lands at or near the gate operand literal in a sliding-window distance sense, while naive's corpus stays far from it -- a CLOSENESS signal that survives dispersed/different-sized seeds where fixed-offset byte enrichment fails
hypotheses.novelty_vs_prior: operand_enrichment (byte_freq_ratio) failed (rule_not_met / seed_starved) for several rule_not_met branches because it requires byte-ALIGNED fixed-offset frequency of the EXACT target byte. value_distance_reached is a genuinely different measurement: per-arm MIN over sliding windows of normalized Hamming distance to the operand literal. It (a) captures the VP Hamming-GRADIENT mechanism (h1 in every signature: 'progressively closer' / 'closer-prefix bucket retained') that fixed-offset exact-byte frequency cannot see, and (b) tolerates dispersed/variable-position operands (sliding window, no alignment), so it scores gates that defeated byte_freq_ratio. Not a relaxed-threshold re-run of the prior rule -- a different metric over a different descriptor.

params.comment: Per arm, MIN over the arm's seeds of (MIN over sliding windows of Hamming(window, target_operand)/width). CMP-aware arms (vp/cmp) should land close (small distance); naive should stall far. operand_literal taken per branch from the signature. NOTE: libpng/3996 is now PRIMARILY scored by the KEEP enrichment hypothesis (value-presence on a single-byte enum); it stays here only as a width<=2-caveated BACKUP net.

libxml2/6967.caveat: width<=2 chance-alignment prone; flagged by tool caveat -- arbiter should honor winner_closer only if distance_gap is non-trivial

libpng/3996.caveat: single-byte color_type enum; width<=2 chance-alignment prone. BACKUP only -- the KEEP value-presence enrichment test is the primary, robust test for this enum. A Hamming gradient is weak here (06->04->03 are not monotone in bit-Hamming), so this branch should label via enrichment, not distance.

hypotheses.prediction: winner_closer == true AND distance_gap >= 0.25 -- the CMP-aware arm's corpus reaches a sliding window whose Hamming distance to the operand literal is materially smaller than naive's nearest window. DISCRIMINATING: a NON-CMP mechanism (scheduling / energy / pure structural-length, where naive blocks for a reason unrelated to a value gradient) predicts distance_gap ~ 0 -- naive's corpus would be just as close to (or as far from) the literal as the CMP arms, because nothing is selecting on operand-closeness. A positive gap rules out 'naive blocks for a non-value reason' and confirms a CMP-distance-climbable value gate. G2: distance is computed over raw seed bytes vs a static operand literal, independent of which fuzzer resolved (the resolve pattern is never an input to the distance computation).

hypotheses.label: A non-local grammar/parse-state gate (DTD hash-triple insertion, XML prolog well-formedness chain) whose 'operand' is an abstract multi-token parser state, not a single fixed literal -- I2S repairs and VP gradient-completes dispersed structural tokens across the whole document
hypotheses.decidable_false_reason: No built measurement can discriminate this sub-group's mechanism, and round-2 inspection of the cards (libxml2_6405, libxml2_6690 analyses) confirms this is structural, not a fixed-offset literal in disguise. (1) operand_literal is null in the signatures: the gate is a parser-STATE predicate -- 6405 needs a genuinely-NEW (name,name2,name3) hash triple inserted via xmlHashAddEntry3 (line 580 false on the dict path); 6690 needs wellFormed==1 preserved through a chain of dispersed '<?xml'/'DOCTYPE'/'SYSTEM' tokens up to an undeclared entity-ref. Neither has a single target byte string -- value_distance_reached has no operand to measure against, and byte_freq_ratio fails on the different-SIZED dispersed_multibyte seeds (data_reality: structural-assembly gates have different-sized winning vs blocking seeds, byte-alignment fails). (2) The tokens that DO appear (DOCTYPE, SYSTEM, <?xml) are at VARIABLE document positions and are necessary-but-not-sufficient: a corpus can contain them and still block (parse-state, not byte-presence), so even a multi-window presence count cannot prove the STATE was reached -- it is confounded with parse-success which is the resolve pattern itself (would violate G2). (3) joint_necessity / depth_reach target other shapes (assembly-depth vpc-needs-both; ctx/ngram iteration-depth) -- this is a single-technique-suffices CMP gate (cmplog=W and value_profile=W independently), not joint, and not a per-seed depth story. (4) libxml2/6405 is additionally seed_starved (W=1, L=27; need >=3 each) and its corpus is on sB only; even a re-bisect (rank-10 candidate) would only restore W/L counts, not supply a measurable operand. The mechanism (I2S/VP repairing dispersed structural tokens) is real and likely correct, but it is honestly NON-DISCRIMINABLE with the current tool set -- an honest inconclusive, not a forced label (G3).

data_realities_respected: operand_enrichment (KEEP hypothesis) requires an on-disk corpus AND >=3 W and >=3 L seeds; corpora exist only for curl, harfbuzz, openthread, sqlite3 on s4. It scores harfbuzz 5503/5517 (fixed-offset GPOS tag) on s4. libpng/3996 (fixed-offset 0x03 enum) is a valid enrichment design but its corpus lives on sB -- the OWNING SERVER arbitrates it; NOT marked inconclusive for being absent on s4 (cross-server rule).

value_distance_reached (KEEP hypothesis) reads on-disk seeds, so on-disk-corpus targets only. On s4 it scores harfbuzz 5503/5517 and sqlite3 14451 directly. libxml2/6967 and libpng/3996 are valid designs but their corpora live on sB (libxml2/libpng) -- the OWNING SERVER arbitrates them.

value_distance_reached flags width<=2 operands as chance-alignment-prone: libxml2/6967 ('[' w1) and libpng/3996 (0x03 w1) carry that caveat. For libpng/3996 the ROBUST test is the value-PRESENCE enrichment (set membership on a single byte), not the Hamming gradient (06/04/00 -> 03 is not monotone in bit-Hamming), so 3996 should label via the KEEP enrichment hypothesis first; distance is only a backup.

structural_grammar_state_gate (libxml2/6405, 6690) is dispersed_multibyte with operand_literal=null over different-sized seeds: byte_freq_ratio byte-alignment fails (data_reality) AND there is no single operand for value_distance_reached; any token-PRESENCE count would be confounded with parse-success (the resolve pattern, G2 violation) -- so it is honestly decidable:false, NOT force-labeled.

No seed_lineage 'I2S event' or 'VP gradient event' descriptor is proposed: I2S and value_profile are both untagged in mutation_op (I2S is a mutator with byte-identical havoc vocab; VP is a feedback, not a mutator). The only measurable signals are corpus byte content (enrichment) and corpus-to-operand distance (value_distance_reached).

notes.round2_resolution: The 3 UNLABELED branches resolve as: (a) libpng/3996 -> reassigned to the KEEP literal_value_gate_cmp_solvable hypothesis as a CROSS-SERVER member (sB arbitrates). Round-1 returned it rule_not_met because it was only tried against a too-strict variant / insufficient seeds; the card proves it is a fixed-offset single-byte enum gate (color_type==0x03 at offset 0x19), identical in kind to its confirmed sibling libpng/3966 and the 7 confirmed members. value-PRESENCE enrichment (operand_enrichment) is the correct, robust tool for a single-byte enum -- NO new mechanism is warranted, and inventing one would violate G3. (b) libxml2/6690 and libxml2/6405 -> stay decidable:false (parser-state gate, null operand). The card re-inspection confirms the gate is an abstract parse-STATE, not a hidden literal.
notes.priors_kept: BOTH decidable priors kept VERBATIM in rule + descriptor: literal_value_gate_cmp_solvable (enrichment) and cmp_gradient_closes_to_operand (distance). Superset/monotonic invariant honored -- the 11 confirmed branches re-validate. The ONLY change is additive: libpng/3996 added to the KEEP enrichment hypothesis's cross_server_branches (does not alter the rule, only its membership/coverage).
notes.new_mechanisms: NONE genuinely new this round. After card re-inspection, libpng/3996 is NOT a new mechanism -- it is the existing fixed-offset literal_value_gate, mis-routed in round 1. Proposing a fresh mechanism for it would be a forced label (the obvious, correct mechanism already exists). structural_grammar_state_gate remains the only NEW (round-1) hypothesis, and it is honestly decidable:false.
notes.g1_discrimination: Each decidable hypothesis names the alternative it rules out: enrichment rules out a structural/length gate (~0 fixed-offset enrichment); distance rules out a non-value blocking reason (~0 distance_gap if naive blocks for scheduling/structure rather than an operand gradient). Both are falsifiable and could come out the other way. For libpng/3996, the enrichment test is discriminating: if color_type==3 were NOT the gate (e.g. a structural prerequisite), CMP-aware corpora would not over-represent 0x03 at offset 0x19, and the test fails -- but the card shows 34/34 winners carry 0x03, so it is predicted to pass.
notes.g2_independence: All measurements take raw corpus/seed bytes vs a static target/operand and never consume the W/L resolve pattern that defined the shape. The decidable:false reason for structural_grammar_state_gate explicitly cites the G2 risk that any token-presence proxy would be confounded with parse-success (= the resolve pattern), which is WHY it is left inconclusive rather than force-labeled.
notes.scored_vs_inconclusive_on_s4: S4-SCORED: harfbuzz 5503/5517 (enrichment + distance), sqlite3 14451 (distance). CROSS-SERVER (owning server arbitrates on its local corpus, same rules): libpng/3996 (enrichment primary + distance backup), libxml2/6967 (distance), plus lcms x5 / libpng 3901,3966 / other confirmed cross-server members. DECIDABLE:FALSE (fallback=inconclusive): libxml2/6405, libxml2/6690. The 11 confirmed-frozen branches are untouched and re-validate under the unchanged KEEP rules.
notes.decidable_false_subgroup: structural_grammar_state_gate = {libxml2/6405, libxml2/6690}. Honest inconclusive (G3): operand_literal=null parser-state gate, different-sized dispersed seeds, 6405 additionally seed_starved (rank-10 re-bisect would restore W/L counts but cannot supply a measurable operand). No built tool discriminates it without confounding the verification signal with the label source; carried to fallback=inconclusive.
